$comment: SD-JWT VC Type Metadata for Proof of Employment / Alumni ID. Spec: draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-16 (24 Apr 2026), RFC 9901.
name: Proof of Employment
description: Verifiable 'employed at' claim (current or former / alumni) without exposing salary or compensation.

display.name: Proof of Employment
display.description: Prove you work (or worked) somewhere — no salary attached.
